title: Bronx Borough President — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Office of the Bronx Borough President object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the two NYC Open Data datasets published under 'Bronx Borough President (BPBX)' (Capital Funding mdgu-ar69, Bronx Community Boards wbau-xy7g) and the brochure content on bronxboropres.nyc.gov (a Revize CMS). Includes the NYC geography spine and a Bronx community-board reference. NOTE: the schema keeps the five-borough enum because these definitions are intended to be reused across all five Borough President offices (this is the same charter role, near-identically implemented); for the Bronx office the borough is always 'Bronx'.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

StateLegislativeDistricts.description: State/federal legislative overlays carried by the Bronx BP datasets.

CommunityBoardReference.description: A reference to one of the Bronx's twelve community boards.

communityBoard.description: Board number ('Community Board'). Bronx boards are 1–12.
